title: Obstacle Avoidance Robot
description: Our first attempt at autonomous navigation. An Arduino Uno reads a front-mounted ultrasonic sensor at 20 Hz. When an obstacle is detected within 25 cm, the robot halts, rotates in place until the path is clear, then resumes forward motion. A second side-facing sensor prevents the robot from drifting into walls during the turn. This project built our understanding of sensor polling, state machines, and timing with millis() instead of delay().
